title: campanula tatrae subsp. tatrae
intro: Campanula tatrae subsp. tatrae, also known as the Tatra bellflower, is a perennial plant species in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Campanula tatrae subsp. tatrae typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves.
